case_title: ZLOT, HAROLD S. et al VS LIQUID REALTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY, LLC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,708.83 FILED BY ZLOT, HAROLD S. GANS, MARTIN AS TO DEFENDANT LIQUID REALTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLAINTIFF FILED DECLARATION TO RESET TRIAL DATE.
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-22-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-13-2006 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LIQUID REALTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY, LLC
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LIQUID REALTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY, LLC AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ZLOT, HAROLD S. GANS, MARTIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-12-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DEFT'S CONTC ORDER REQUEST FILED; PAID $10 FEE; TO FOLDER/TRAY.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF ZLOT, HAROLD S.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF GANS, MARTIN
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-22-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-12-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 ORDER GRANTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZLOT, HAROLD S. GANS, MARTIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIQUID REALTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY, LLC $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $188.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,188.50, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO CORRECT THE NAME OF DEFENDANT TO LIQUID REALTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY, LLC, IN PLACE AND INSTEAD OF SCOTT LANDRESS AKA LIQUID REALTY HOLDINGS II, LLC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LIQUID REALTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY, LLC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT ZLOT, HAROLD S. GANS, MARTIN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LIQUID REALTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY, LLC
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED. ONE IS ALREADY ON FILE.
